children.text: Part A or B of subchapter IV.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraphs (3) and (4), the Secretary shall award a grant under subsection (a) to a local educational agency eligible under for a fiscal year in an amount equal to the initial amount determined under paragraph (2) for the fiscal year minus the total amount received by the agency under the provisions of law described in for the preceding fiscal year.section 7345(b) of this titlesection 7345(c) of this title

children.heading: Special determination
children.label: B Special determination
children.text: For a local educational agency that is eligible under and is a member of an educational service agency, the Secretary may determine the award amount by subtracting from the initial amount determined under paragraph (2), an amount that is equal to that local educational agency’s per-pupil share of the total amount received by the educational service agency under the provisions described in , as long as a determination under this subparagraph would not disproportionately affect any State.section 7345(b)(1)(C) of this titlesection 7345(c) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The initial amount referred to in paragraph (1) is equal to $100 multiplied by the total number of students in excess of 50 students, in average daily attendance at the schools served by the local educational agency, plus $20,000, except that the initial amount may not exceed $60,000.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: If the amount made available to carry out this section for any fiscal year is not sufficient to pay in full the amounts that local educational agencies are eligible to receive under paragraph (1) for such year, the Secretary shall ratably reduce such amounts for such year.

children.heading: Additional amounts
children.label: B Additional amounts
children.text: If additional funds become available for making payments under paragraph (1) for such fiscal year, payments that were reduced under subparagraph (A) shall be increased on the same basis as such payments were reduced.

children.label: A
children.text: for fiscal year 2017, 75 percent of the amount such agency received for fiscal year 2015;

children.label: B
children.text: for fiscal year 2018, 50 percent of the amount such agency received for fiscal year 2015; and

children.label: C
children.text: for fiscal year 2019, 25 percent of the amount such agency received for fiscal year 2015.

children.heading: Disbursement
children.label: c Disbursement
children.text: The Secretary shall disburse the funds awarded to a local educational agency under this section for a fiscal year not later than July 1 of that fiscal year.
